# Daham Denuwan

> Official AI-readable profile summary for Daham Denuwan, Student Developer from Sri Lanka.

## Profile Overview
- **Name:** Daham Denuwan
- **Role:** Student Developer
- **Location:** Sri Lanka
- **Focus:** EdTech, Web Applications, and Educational Tools
- **Languages:** HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python
- **Skills:** UI Design, Programming, and Problem Solving
- **Project URL:** https://github.io

## Biography & Focus
Daham Denuwan is an independent student developer who builds digital educational platforms designed to help students study efficiently, navigate exams faster, and reduce academic stress. From a young age, curiosity about how websites operate led him to self-teach programming.

## Projects & Portfolio
- **EduTrack:** A digital school report card and academic tracking system built to manage student records.
- **Revision Systems:** Interactive digital flashcards designed for quick academic revision.
- **Study Resources:** Automated organization tools for sorting and managing student past papers.
